title: Utilization Of Wild Relatives In Genetic Improvement Of Arachis Hypogaea L. I. techniques
abstract:
Many of the wild relatives of Arachis hypogaea are potentially useful in

in transferring genes to ttLe cultivated groundnut. Studies on karyom
